BREAKING: A source close to Iran's Ghalibaf says in the past two hours Iran's IRGC "has fired at several US vessels attempting to approach Iranian shores," along with "two rogue" commercial vessels.

The source says "the Strait of Hormuz is now completely closed off from all routes and will not reopen in the medium term," adding that "attacks will expand and the conflict will deepen."
